contactPage.intro: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's discuss how we can work together.
contactPage.availabilityBody: Currently accepting new projects for Q2 2026. Response time: ~24 hours.

faqs.q: What is your typical project timeline?
faqs.a: Most projects take 2-8 weeks depending on complexity. I provide detailed timelines during our initial consultation.

faqs.q: Do you work with international clients?
faqs.a: Absolutely! I work remotely with clients worldwide and accommodate different time zones.

faqs.q: What technologies do you specialize in?
faqs.a: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AI integration.

aboutPage.heroIntro: Fullstack web developer with a genuine interest in digital marketing — I sit in a rare intersection: I understand both the technical architecture side and the content and campaign side.
aboutPage.whoAmIPara1: I'm a fullstack web developer with a genuine interest in digital marketing — I sit in a rare intersection: I understand both the technical architecture side and the content and campaign side.
aboutPage.whoAmIPara2: My background is unconventional. Eleven years in operational management taught me to read situations quickly, work under pressure and adapt on the fly — before I retrained in web development and digital communication. That dual experience isn't a contradiction: it's an asset.
aboutPage.whoAmIPara3: I use AI daily — not as a trend, but as a practical tool integrated into my workflow: generating study cards with Gemini, development assistance, content creation and optimisation. I build tools for my own needs, and it teaches me faster than any course.
aboutPage.whatIBringBody: In a digital marketing role, I'm the profile who doesn't need an explanation of how an integration works, how to read a console error, or how to optimise a title tag. I contribute from day one — and I bridge the gap between technical and marketing teams when needed.

philosophies.quote: Right model, right task. Claude for nuanced reasoning, Gemini for fast research, ChatGPT for code exploration.
AI accelerates, humans validate. I don't publish generated content without critical review. AI is a co-pilot, not autopilot.
Build to understand. QuizFlip and OpenClaw aren't showcase projects — they're tools I actually use.

aboutPage.skillsSubtitle: Technologies I use daily across my projects
aboutPage.aiWorkflowIntro: AI has been part of my workflow since 2023 — not as a replacement tool, but as an accelerator. I choose the right model for the task, and I know when not to use it.

aiUsages.title: Development
aiUsages.body: Component generation, debugging, code review and documentation. AI reduces lookup time on known syntax and speeds up exploration of unfamiliar patterns.

aiUsages.title: Learning
aiUsages.body: Topic-based flashcard generation via QuizFlip + Gemini. Technical documentation summaries. Keeping up with emerging tools — OpenClaw being a recent example.

aiUsages.title: Content Creation
aiUsages.body: Web copywriting, SEO reformulation, A/B variant generation for headlines and CTAs. The human validates relevance, AI accelerates production.

aiUsages.title: Automation
aiUsages.body: Personal assistant via OpenClaw + Telegram, with multi-model fallback. Repetitive tasks, reminders, processing pipelines — all triggered from my phone.

aboutPage.interestsSubtitle: A holistic approach where physical discipline and creativity fuel innovation
aboutPage.ctaBody: Web developer with a marketing mindset — I build digital experiences that serve concrete business goals: SEO visibility, lead generation, user engagement.

projectsPage.title: Selected Works
projectsPage.subtitle: A curated collection of projects that demonstrate expertise in modern web technologies
projectsPage.emptyBody: We couldn't find any projects matching "{filter}". Try selecting a different technology or view all projects.

projectDetailPage.overviewBody1: This project represents a comprehensive solution built with modern technologies and best practices. Every aspect was carefully considered to ensure scalability, maintainability, and exceptional user experience.
projectDetailPage.overviewBody2Suffix: The implementation focuses on clean architecture, type safety, and performance optimization. Special attention was given to the developer experience and long-term maintainability of the codebase.
projectDetailPage.technicalBody1: The project leverages a modern stack including Next.js 14 with App Router, TypeScript for type safety, and Tailwind CSS for styling. The database layer uses Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL for reliable data persistence.
projectDetailPage.technicalBody2: Docker containerization ensures consistent deployments across environments, while CI/CD pipelines automate testing and deployment workflows.
